Settings.WorkflowRoles.heading: Workflow roles
Settings.WorkflowRoles.subtitle: Manage knowledge-transfer task templates per contractor role.
Settings.WorkflowRoles.emptyBody: The four built-in templates (Software Engineer, Designer, Product Manager, Generic Consultant) are always available. Add a custom template to extend the role taxonomy for your team.
Settings.WorkflowRoles.dueDayLabel: Due in N days from start
Settings.PtoKeywords.heading: Calendar PTO keywords
Settings.PtoKeywords.subtitle: Add language-specific keywords. Calendar events whose titles match these words are treated as paid time off.
Settings.PtoKeywords.empty: No additional keywords. Built-in keywords are still active.
Payments.bacs.settingsPageSubtitle: Configure UK BACS and EU SEPA submitter details used when exporting payment runs
Payments.bacs.sunHelper: 6-digit BACS Service User Number issued by your sponsor bank
Payments.bacs.featureFlagOffBanner: BACS export is disabled. Enable it in feature flags to use BACS Std 18.
Payments.bacs.transliterationWarning: {count} character(s) transliterated to BACS character set. Review the preview before downloading.
Payments.bacs.unmappableError: {count} character(s) could not be transliterated — BACS will reject this file. Edit the contractor name(s) and try again.
Payments.bacs.emptyState: No BACS-eligible items in this run. Add UK contractors with GBP invoices to generate a BACS file.
Payments.bacs.submitterNotConfigured: BACS submitter details are required. Configure them in Settings → Payments.
Payments.bacs.generateFailure: BACS generation failed. Please try again or contact support if the problem persists.
Payments.ukBank.validationWarn: Sort code is in an exception range — modulus check not decisive. Continue if your bank confirms this account.
Payments.ukBank.validationFail: Sort code format invalid — 6 digits required
Payments.lateInterest.explanationTooltip: Calculated under the Late Payment of Commercial Debts (Interest) Act 1998. Rate = Bank of England base rate + 8%, fixed on the last day of the preceding 6-month statutory period (30 June or 31 December).
Payments.lateInterest.claimSecondaryOpti: Issue claim as a secondary invoice
Payments.lateInterest.claimDialogBody: This will snapshot the current interest + compensation amounts, generate a PDF claim letter, and (optionally) issue a secondary invoice for the claim amount. The snapshot is immutable — further accrual will not be added.
Payments.lateInterest.claimedBanner: Claim snapshot taken {date} — £{amount}. Further interest does not accrue on this claim.
Payments.lateInterest.waiveReasonPlaceho: Reason (required, min 10 chars) — e.g., customer negotiated settlement, goodwill gesture, admin error
Payments.lateInterest.revokeReasonPlaceh: Reason for revoking (required) — e.g., customer refused settlement
Payments.dashboardTile.title: Overdue receivables (UK)
Payments.skonto.useDefaultPill: Using contractor default: {percent}% / {discountDays} days / net {netDays} days
Payments.skonto.previewLineEn: {percent}% discount if paid within {discountDays} days, otherwise net {netDays} days
Payments.skonto.validationDaysOrdering: Discount period must be shorter than net period
Payments.skonto.eligibleBanner: Save {discountAmount} if paid by {date} — discounted total {discountedTotal}
Payments.skonto.takenBanner: Skonto applied at payment: {discountAmount} saved on {paidDate}
Payments.skonto.notTakenBanner: Paid after discount window — no Skonto applied
Payments.skonto.defaultHelper: Applied automatically to new DE invoices for this contractor. Can be overridden per invoice.
Payments.skonto.outsideWindowHelper: Discount window expired ({date}) — full amount applies
Payments.skonto.snapshotToast: Skonto applied to run — {count} invoice(s) discounted, {totalSavings} saved

Ir35Chain.title: IR35 chain
Ir35Chain.subtitle: Track the client → agency → PSC → worker chain and SDS delivery/acknowledgement per link.
Ir35Chain.addParticipantHint: Add an agency or personal service company to this engagement's chain.

OtherClientAttestation.subtitle: Confirm whether this contractor is engaged with other clients — used to support the DRV audit defence bundle.
OtherClientAttestation.statementHint: Describe your other active clients. Maximum {max} characters.

Classification.documents.subtitle: Generate the legally required status determination statement and audit defence bundle.
Classification.documents.generateDisable: Complete an IR35 classification assessment to generate an SDS.
Classification.documents.drvDisabledNeed: Complete a Scheinselbständigkeit classification assessment to generate a DRV defence bundle.
Capture the other-clients attestation below before generating a DRV defence bundle.
Classification.AdvisoryBanner.label: Legal notice
Classification.ExpertHelp.title: Get Expert Help
Classification.ExpertHelp.subtitle: Connect with qualified advisers for your classification questions.
Classification.ExpertHelp.orgAdviser.des: Your organisation has designated an adviser for classification queries.
Classification.ExpertHelp.gb.title: UK IR35 Advisers
Classification.ExpertHelp.gb.description: Connect with CIOT or ATT-accredited tax advisers who specialise in IR35.
Classification.ExpertHelp.gb.ciot.title: CIOT — Find a Tax Adviser
Classification.ExpertHelp.gb.ciot.descri: Directory of Chartered Institute of Taxation members

Classification.ExpertHelp.gb.hmrc.descri: Official HMRC guidance on IR35 and employment status

Admin.BoeRate.pageSubtitle: Reference data powering UK statutory late-payment interest calculations
Admin.BoeRate.deleteDialogBody: Deleting a historical rate changes interest calculations for any invoices that fell overdue during its validity period. Proceed only if this entry was entered in error.
Admin.BoeRate.pollerSuccess: Last BoE API poll: {date} — rate unchanged / new rate {percent}% recorded
Admin.BoeRate.pollerFailure: Last BoE API poll failed on {date}. Manual entry still possible; poller will retry at the next scheduled run.
Admin.ClassificationEngineFlag.title: Classification Engine Flag Status
Admin.ClassificationEngineFlag.subtitle: module.classification-engine kill-switch status and disclaimer signoff registry.
Admin.ClassificationEngineFlag.pendingGa: Flag ON in Unleash but app-gated — {count} disclaimer(s) PENDING.
Resolve by submitting a PR updating packages/validators/src/legal/signoff-registry.json
Offboarding.Templates.SoftwareEngineer.h: Hand over architecture diagrams, runbooks, and any internal technical documentation owned by the contractor.
Offboarding.Templates.SoftwareEngineer.c: Pair with the successor on a guided tour of the services, repos, and CI workflows the contractor owned.
Offboarding.Templates.SoftwareEngineer.o: Resolve or hand off open pull requests
Close, merge, or transfer ownership of every open PR authored by the contractor.
Offboarding.Templates.SoftwareEngineer.d: Annotate the deployment runbook with the contractor's tribal knowledge — quirks, escalation paths, post-deploy checks.
Offboarding.Templates.SoftwareEngineer.o: Replace the contractor in PagerDuty / Opsgenie schedules and notify the rotation.
Offboarding.Templates.SoftwareEngineer.a: Document any in-flight architectural decisions the contractor was driving.
Offboarding.Templates.SoftwareEngineer.k: List known production issues the contractor was tracking and the state of any in-progress fixes.
Offboarding.Templates.Designer.designSys: Transfer ownership of design-system components, tokens, and contribution patterns to the successor.
Offboarding.Templates.Designer.figmaTran: Move the contractor's Figma files into the team library and reassign editor seats.
Offboarding.Templates.Designer.assetLibr: Remove the contractor from shared asset libraries and reassign curation duties.
Offboarding.Templates.Designer.activePro: Walk the successor through every in-flight design project — scope, constraints, open decisions.
Offboarding.Templates.Designer.brandGuid: Replace the contractor as the brand-guidelines authoring contact and re-run the publication workflow.
Offboarding.Templates.Designer.researchA: Move the contractor's research notes, transcripts, and synthesis docs into the team archive.
Offboarding.Templates.ProductManager.roa: Hand over the roadmap document and any planning boards to the successor or interim owner.
Offboarding.Templates.ProductManager.sta: Schedule introduction calls between key stakeholders and the successor or interim owner.
Offboarding.Templates.ProductManager.act: Brief the successor on every in-flight initiative — scope, blockers, next milestones.
Offboarding.Templates.ProductManager.met: Capture the why behind each tracked metric and any caveats the successor needs to interpret it.
Offboarding.Templates.ProductManager.res: File user-research insights, interview transcripts, and synthesis docs in the team library.
Offboarding.Templates.ProductManager.ven: Notify external vendors of the contact change and reassign the team-side owner for each contract.
Compile a single handover packet covering scope, deliverables, decisions, and outstanding risks.
Snapshot the state of every active project — what's done, in flight, and at risk.
Brief the successor on each client and key stakeholder, including communication preferences and political context.
Upload final deliverables and source files (slides, sheets, drafts) into the team repository.
Catalogue the contractor's contributions to the team knowledge base for easy discovery.
Share the contractor's curated contact list (clients, vendors, advisors) with the successor.
Offboarding.OverrideDialog.title: Override IP verification block
Offboarding.OverrideDialog.description: Owners can complete this offboarding without IP verification. The override is permanent and recorded in the audit log.
Offboarding.OverrideDialog.reasonPlaceho: Describe why IP verification is being bypassed (minimum 20 characters).
Offboarding.OverrideDialog.reasonClientE: Provide at least 20 characters explaining the override.
Offboarding.OverrideDialog.reasonServerE: The reason must be at least 20 characters and contain a substantive explanation.
Offboarding.OverrideDialog.acknowledgeme: I confirm IP verification is being intentionally bypassed and I accept responsibility for any compliance gap.
Offboarding.OverrideDialog.discardConfir: You typed an override reason. Closing now will discard it.
Offboarding.OverrideBadge.label: IP verification overridden
Offboarding.PtoBadge.label: No fallback approver — manager on PTO
Offboarding.PtoBadge.tooltip: Configure a fallback approver in Settings > Teams to avoid routing to organization owners by default.
Offboarding.LocaleFallback.srDescription: This template field has not been translated to {targetLocale}; the English value is shown as a fallback.
Workflow.Start.heading: Start offboarding for {contractor}
